title: Open the ACB API Screen From the ACB System Screen
summary: Access the ACB API screen from the ACB System screen using the documented API control on the System HMI.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to navigate from the ACB System screen to the ACB API screen on the System HMI.
not_for: Do not use this runbook for performing detailed control actions within the ACB API screen, because the source only documents how to access the screen.
Do not use this runbook for recovery beyond basic navigation failure, because the source provides no further recovery steps.

responsibilities: Navigate on the System HMI to the ACB System screen.
Press API on the ACB System screen.
Verify that the ACB API screen is displayed.

safety_notes: This source documents HMI navigation only.
No lockout/tagout or production stop requirements are stated in the source.

system_preconditions: The ACB System screen is available for navigation.

external_references.quote_or_summary: Press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

visual_references.description: Reference image for the ACB System screen from which the API control is selected.
Reference image of the ACB API screen that should appear after pressing API.

steps.title: Go to the ACB System screen
steps.purpose: Position the operator at the documented source screen used to open the ACB API screen.
steps.instruction: Go to the "ACB System" screen on the System HMI.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System screen is displayed and available for interaction.
steps.healthy_condition: The ACB System screen is visible on the HMI.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB System screen is not available or cannot be reached.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use this image as the ACB System screen reference before selecting API.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB System screen cannot be reached on the System HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

source_evidence.short_description: System HMI screen showing the ACB System Overview interface referenced in Figure 4-1.

steps.title: Press API on the ACB System screen
steps.purpose: Use the documented HMI control to open the ACB API screen.
steps.instruction: Press API on the "ACB System" screen to open the ACB API screen.
steps.expected_result: The system navigates from the ACB System screen to the ACB API screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Selecting API opens the ACB API screen.
steps.failure_condition: The API control is not present on the ACB System screen or pressing it does not open the ACB API screen.

actions.label: Select API
actions.exact_action: Press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the ACB System screen where the API control is selected.
Reference the destination ACB API screen that should open after pressing API.

stop_or_escalate_if: The API control is not present on the "ACB System" screen.
Pressing API does not open the ACB API screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

source_evidence.short_description: System HMI screen for the ACB API interface used to control the OptiSweep system, AGVs, and totes.

steps.title: Verify the ACB API screen is displayed
steps.purpose: Confirm that the navigation action succeeded and the intended screen is available for use.
steps.instruction: Verify that the ACB API screen is displayed.
steps.expected_result: The ACB API screen is open and available for use.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed screen matches the ACB API screen shown in Figure 4-8.
steps.failure_condition: A different screen is displayed or the ACB API screen does not appear.

actions.label: Confirm ACB API screen
actions.exact_action: Verify that the ACB API screen is displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Confirm the displayed screen matches the ACB API screen shown in Figure 4-8.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB API screen does not open.
The displayed screen does not match the documented ACB API screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

success_criteria: The operator reaches the ACB System screen.
Pressing API opens the ACB API screen.
The ACB API screen is displayed and available for use.
healthy_conditions: The ACB System screen is accessible on the System HMI.
The API control is present on the ACB System screen.
The displayed screen matches Figure 4-8, ACB API Screen.
failure_conditions: The ACB System screen cannot be reached.
The API control is not present on the "ACB System" screen.
Pressing API does not open the ACB API screen.
A different screen is displayed instead of the ACB API screen.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the API control is not present on the "ACB System" screen or the ACB API screen does not open, because the source provides no further recovery steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: ACB System screen reference used as the starting point for navigation.
Destination ACB API screen reference for verification after pressing API.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

missing_details: The source does not provide a time estimate for this procedure.
The source does not specify role boundaries beyond operator-level HMI use.
The source does not provide recovery steps if navigation fails.
The source does not document detailed actions to perform within the ACB API screen in this procedure.
